data.title: Condor Energy Explores New Options for Gas Project
data.description:
Global Oil & Gas (AU:CND) has released an update.

Condor Energy Ltd. has announced promising development options for the Piedra Redonda Gas Project in Peru, following a technical review that revealed substantial gas resources. The project boasts contingent resources of 404 billion cubic feet with potential upside, and scalable options such as gas-to-power and compressed natural gas delivery are being explored. The company is advancing commercial and feasibility studies to determine the optimal commercialization pathway.

data.title: Otto Energy Updates Capital Return Timetable
data.description:
Otto Energy Limited (AU:OEL) has released an update.

Otto Energy Limited has announced an updated timetable for its return of capital, approved by shareholders for up to A$40 million or A$0.008 per share. The distribution is still pending a tax-free ruling from the Australian Tax Office, causing delays. Otto Energy is committed to resolving this and has provided a new schedule for shareholders, with payments expected by December 2024.

For further insights into AU:OEL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Neurotech International Announces AGM for November 2024
data.description:
Neurotech International Ltd. (AU:NTI) has released an update.

Neurotech International Ltd has announced its Annual General Meeting scheduled for November 20, 2024, in Melbourne. Shareholders are encouraged to participate by either attending physically or through proxy voting, with details available on the ASX Announcement Platform. The meeting is crucial for shareholders as it impacts their holdings, and they are advised to seek professional guidance on voting matters.

data.title: ispace CEO’s Shareholding Temporarily Reduced
data.description:
ispace,inc. (JP:9348) has released an update.

ispace, inc. has announced a temporary reduction in the shareholding ratio of its CEO, Takeshi Hakamada, due to a share lending agreement with CVI Investments, Inc. This change, which affects Hakamada’s status as the largest shareholder, is expected to revert to its original state, ensuring his ongoing commitment to the company as it progresses towards commercialization.

data.title: Pengana Global Private Credit Trust Dividend Update
data.description:
Pengana Global Private Credit Trust (AU:PCX) has released an update.

Pengana Global Private Credit Trust has updated its dividend distribution details, specifically adjusting the Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRP) price. The announcement pertains to ordinary units fully paid and covers the period ending September 30, 2024. Investors should note the revised record date as October 2, 2024, reflecting changes to their financial strategies.

data.title: Magmatic Resources Strengthens Board with New Director
data.description:
Magmatic Resources Ltd. (AU:MAG) has released an update.

Magmatic Resources Ltd. has announced the appointment of Malcolm Norris to its board of directors, effective October 16, 2024. While Norris holds no direct securities, his partner, Wendy Anne Collins, owns 8,554 fully paid ordinary shares in the company. This leadership addition could be pivotal as the company navigates future market opportunities.

data.title: Prosegur Cash Announces Third Dividend Payment Schedule
data.description:
Prosegur Cash (ES:CASH) has released an update.

Prosegur Cash has announced the schedule for the third installment of its dividend payout, amounting to 0.0101 gross euros per share, which will be paid on October 23, 2024. This payment is part of a total dividend approved by the company’s shareholders earlier this year, set to distribute nearly 60 million euros. Investors should note the key dates surrounding this payment, including the last trading day on October 18 and the ex-dividend date on October 21.

For further insights into ES:CASH stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Vision Inc. Honored for Excellence in CRM Practices
data.description:
Vision, Inc. ( Japan) (JP:9416) has released an update.

Vision Inc. has been awarded the ‘CRM Best Practice Award’ for the 13th time, recognizing its innovative use of customer feedback to enhance customer satisfaction and business performance. The company successfully reactivated communication with dormant customers by utilizing AI and strategic communication tools, exemplifying effective customer-centric management.
